who: hospitality purchasing managers in restaurants processing 10-20 purchase orders/month
offer: For hospitality purchasing managers in restaurants processing 10-20 purchase orders/month, inefficient inventory management causes stockouts. We monitor inventory usage and flag reorder points instead of manual tracking of inventory levels.
problem: Inefficient inventory management leading to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality purchasing managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to purchasing managers with demo video
Participate in community forums sharing inventory tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of inventory data and simple dashboard for inventory overview on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
